description_long: This rifle features a modern tactical design with a skeletonized stock and a prominent pistol grip for ergonomic handling. It is equipped with a large telescopic scope mounted on the top rail, enhancing its long-range targeting capabilities. The barrel is fitted with a suppressor, reducing muzzle flash and noise, and a vertical foregrip is attached beneath the handguard for improved stability during firing. The rifle uses a detachable box magazine, visible just ahead of the trigger guard. The overall finish is matte black, with metallic and polymer components, giving it a robust and utilitarian appearance. Additional tactical accessories, such as a side-mounted flashlight or laser, are also present, making it suitable for urban operations.
description: A modern tactical rifle with a skeletonized stock, suppressor, telescopic scope, and detachable box magazine, finished in matte black with polymer and metal parts.
description_view_0: Side view showing the skeletonized stock, large scope, suppressor, vertical foregrip, and detachable box magazine.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the suppressor, scope alignment, and vertical foregrip beneath the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same tactical features, with additional visibility of side-mounted accessories.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock structure, scope eyepiece, and pistol grip alignment.
